description: Fragment from the beginning of a kettuba. The bride's father's name is Munajjā ha-Parnas (ZL) and the groom is Yeshuʿa ha-Levi. There is a later addendum on verso in Judaeo-Arabic, mentioning numbers, with Arabic script underneath.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
